title: Voronezh, Voronezh Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Voronezh, Voronezh Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Voronezh is a city in Voronezh Oblast with a population of 1,050,000. A historic city in the Black Earth region, a major industrial and cultural center with a well-preserved 18th-century center.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
